title: More Nonsense Limerick 71
content:
There was an old person of Sestri,
    Who sate himself down in the vestry;
    When they said, "You are wrong!" 
    He merely said "Bong!"
    That repulsive old person of Sestri.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 71" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
